_doc: Pinned per-metric scorecard-debt baseline for the unified control pane. Re-pin after a debt drop to ratchet the trend down: python tools/scorecard_control_pane.py --pin
_note_slop: code-slop entry added when the code-slop scorecard was introduced; the committed snapshot read 269, and the baseline floor is pinned at 275 to leave a few units of headroom for the +-1 peer-commit churn on this live shared trunk (the slop axis walks the tree, so its count drifts as peers land .go changes). total_debt bumped by 275 (44->319) to keep the slop metric consistent WITHOUT re-pinning the pre-existing per-metric drift (seo/repo-hygiene/code) the stale 2026-06-22 baseline carries. --check is independently red from that pre-existing drift; only the unit test is CI-gated. Drive slop below 275 and re-pin to ratchet down (operator decision; re-pin re-floors everything).
